content: oapi-codegen v2.7.1 (github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2). Config: codegen.yaml with 'package: api, generate: [std-http-server: true, models: true], output: gen.go'. Generates ServerInterface with method per endpoint. go:generate directive: //go:generate go run github.com/oapi-codegen/oapi-codegen/v2/cmd/oapi-codegen -config codegen.yaml api/openapi.yaml. Runtime dependency: github.com/oapi-codegen/runtime v1.4.2. Generated types implement StrictServerInterface; wire with HandlerWithOptions(). For healthz-only, generated file goes in backend/internal/api/generated.go.
